summary: A small rectangular bunker-style structure with a stepped pyramidal dark wood roof. The base features stone brick walls with five evenly-spaced glass windows on the front face, set on a gravel foundation. The building appears to be a defensive or storage structure with minimal ornamentation.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box with stepped pyramidal roof

rebuild_hints: Build rectangular stone brick base approximately 10 blocks wide by 6 blocks deep
Install 5 evenly-spaced glass windows (2 blocks tall) on front wall, centered
Create stepped pyramidal roof using dark wood planks with 3-4 receding layers
Add gravel foundation layer around perimeter
Roof steps should decrease by 1 block width on each side per layer
Maintain symmetry along the length axis
Windows appear to be framed with stone brick borders
uncertainties: Exact interior layout not visible from exterior views
Precise number of roof layers difficult to count from angles shown
Door or entrance location not clearly visible in any view
Exact height of stone brick wall section (appears 3-4 blocks)
